introSection:
Motorbike Roller Coaster is a motorbike roller coaster located at Happy World in Pukou, Nanjing, Jiangsu, China.

It is one of the latest coasters with a hydraulic launch.
fullText:
Motorbike Roller Coaster is a motorbike roller coaster located at Happy World in Pukou, Nanjing, Jiangsu, China.

It is one of the latest coasters with a hydraulic launch.
